step_rationale: Regulates platelet activation and post-AMI remodeling; linked to thrombotic progression.
mechanism: miRNA modulating platelet function and ventricular remodeling following acute ischemic injury.

references.title: Serum Circulating miR-150 is a Predictor of Post-Acute Myocardial Infarction Heart Failure.
Platelet microRNA for predicting acute myocardial infarction.
MicroRNA-150: a novel marker of left ventricular remodeling after acute myocardial infarction.
